ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., CAM, LM, CB, ST) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the player participates in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (left or right) */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Current market value of the player */,
  "contract_expiry" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract expires */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile image */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Player's social media handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team participates in */,
  "club" TEXT /* Club or organization the team represents */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the current manager */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league or competition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league or competition */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "league_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the league's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team participating in the game */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team participating in the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss, Draw) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators who attended the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "match_report_url" TEXT /* URL of the match report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of player statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistics are for */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the game */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance rating of the player in the game */,
  "motm" INTEGER /* Whether the player was awarded Man of the Match (MOTM) */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played in the game */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy percentage */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the player */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered by the player */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the player (if a goalkeeper) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the note is about */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the note is for */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the note */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., CAM, LM, CB, ST) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the player started playing in the position */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the player stopped playing in the position (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the team (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the league */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the league (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, scout, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
